title: Hiring Medical Officer at AIIMS Delhi

jsonLd.title: Hiring Medical Officer at AIIMS Delhi
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at AIIMS Delhi. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Medical Officer to strengthen our Vijayawada-based team.

About AIIMS Delhi:
AIIMS Delhi is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• BPharm / MPharm / PharmD
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Wound Care
• Proficiency in EMR/EHR
• Proficiency in Patient Care
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Pharmacovigilance

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Vijayawada, Andhra Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with AIIMS Delhi!
